steps.title: Compare the uses of mimicry
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a difference. The notes say crab spiders mimic flowers to ambush prey, while katydids mimic leaves to hide from predators. The relevant contrast is the purpose of mimicry for each animal.

steps.title: Reject noncontrasting choices
steps.content: Choice A swaps the examples from the notes. Choice B says both animals use mimicry but does not explain how their uses differ. Choice D defines mimicry generally without mentioning either animal's purpose. The remaining choice states the ambush-versus-hiding contrast. The answer is C.
